results.question: 昨天整体核销收入、核销GMV、核销人次、核销人数、核销客单价是多少？
results.effective_sql: SELECT SUM(exe_income) AS 核销收入, SUM(exe_amount) AS 核销GMV, COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id) AS 核销人次, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS 核销人数, SUM(exe_income) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id), 0) AS 核销客单价 FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND is_valid = 1 AND executed_date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1)

results.question: 最近30天各门店核销收入 TOP10
results.effective_sql: SELECT t2.sy_hospital_name AS 门店, SUM(t1.exe_income) AS 核销收入 FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d t1 JOIN soyoung_dw.dim_qy_tenant_info_all_d t2 ON t1.tenant_id = t2.tenant_id WHERE t1.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND t2.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND t1.is_valid = 1 AND t1.executed_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND t1.executed_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) GROUP BY t2.sy_hospital_name ORDER BY SUM(t1.exe_income) DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: 本周私域新客核销收入是多少？
results.effective_sql: SELECT SUM(t1.exe_income) AS exe_income FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d t1 WHERE t1.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND t1.is_valid = 1 AND t1.is_new = 1 AND t1.cx_first_channel = '私域' AND t1.executed_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), WEEKDAY(CAST(CURRENT_DATE() AS DATETIME))) AND t1.executed_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1)

results.question: 最近30天私域、公域、老带新的核销收入、人次、客单价对比
results.effective_sql: SELECT cx_first_channel AS 获客一级渠道, SUM(exe_income) AS 核销收入, COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id) AS 核销人次, SUM(exe_income) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id), 0) AS 客单价 FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND is_valid = 1 AND executed_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND executed_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND cx_first_channel IN ('私域', '公域', '老带新') GROUP BY cx_first_channel

results.question: 最近30天新客和老客核销收入、人次、客单价分别是多少？
results.effective_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN is_new = 1 THEN '新客' ELSE '老客' END AS customer_type, SUM(exe_income) AS execution_income, COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id) AS execution_times, SUM(exe_income) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id), 0) AS avg_order_value FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND is_valid = 1 AND executed_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND executed_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) GROUP BY is_new

results.question: 最近30天大单品、常规品、大师团核销收入对比
results.effective_sql:
SELECT revenue_category, SUM(exe_income) AS exe_income FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND executed_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND executed_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND is_valid = 1
AND revenue_category IN ('大单品','常规品','大师团')
GROUP BY revenue_category

results.question: 最近30天品项核销收入 TOP20
results.effective_sql: SELECT standard_name, SUM(exe_income) AS exe_income FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND is_valid = 1 AND executed_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND executed_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) GROUP BY standard_name ORDER BY exe_income DESC LIMIT 20

results.question: 最近90天奇迹胶原品项渗透率是多少？

checks.detail: LLM SQL rejected by gate, template fallback. errors=['item_penetration_missing_regexp']

results.effective_sql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT  customer_id,
            standard_name
    FROM    soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
    WHERE   dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
    AND     is_valid = 1
    AND     executed_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),90) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
),
agg AS (
    SELECT  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS 总核销人数,
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN standard_name REGEXP '奇迹胶原' THEN customer_id END) AS 品项核销人数
    FROM    base
)
SELECT  品项核销人数,
        总核销人数,

results.question: 截至昨天各门店待核销金额 TOP10
results.effective_sql:
SELECT t2.sy_hospital_name AS store, SUM(t1.left_gmv) AS unverified_amount FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_order_info_all_d t1 JOIN soyoung_dw.dim_qy_tenant_info_all_d t2 ON t1.tenant_id = t2.tenant_id WHERE t1.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AND t2.dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1)
AND t1.left_num > 0
GROUP BY t2.sy_hospital_name ORDER BY unverified_amount DESC LIMIT 10
